Part.Source:
&outsdtCadastroPDV.StsCom = 'N' &DataHora = servernow() &outsdtCadastroPDV.DataUltSync = toformattedString(&DataHora) &outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvVer = RetornaVersaoPDV.udp()
do Case CAse &insdtCadastroPDV.OqueFazer = 'CAD'
For Each Order EmpCod, PdvCod Where EmpCod = &insdtCadastroPDV.EmpCod Where PdvValidacao = &insdtCadastroPDV.CodigoValidacao
&outsdtCadastroPDV.EmpCod = EmpCod &outsdtCadastroPDV.OqueFazer = &insdtCadastroPDV.OqueFazer &outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvCod = PdvCod &outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvImpCod = PdvImpCod &outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvCtaBanCod = PdvCtaBanCod &outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvId = PdvId &outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvRandon = PdvRandon &outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvTefBanCarCod = PdvTefBanCarCod &outsdtCadastroPDV.StsCom = 'S' &outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvNfeSer65 = PdvNfeSer65 &outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvTefCom = PdvTefCom &outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvTipFec = PdvTipFec &outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvPixCbrCod = PdvPixCbrCod Exit EndFor
CAse &insdtCadastroPDV.OqueFazer = 'UPD'
For Each Order EmpCod, PdvCod Where EmpCod = &insdtCadastroPDV.EmpCod Where PdvRandon = &insdtCadastroPDV.PdvRandon
&outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvCod = PdvCod &outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvImpCod = PdvImpCod &outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvCtaBanCod = PdvCtaBanCod &outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvNfeSer65 = PdvNfeSer65 &outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvTefBanCarCod = PdvTefBanCarCod &outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvTefCom = PdvTefCom &outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvTipFec = PdvTipFec &outsdtCadastroPDV.PdvPixCbrCod = PdvPixCbrCod &outsdtCadastroPDV.StsCom = 'S'
Exit EndFor
CAse &insdtCadastroPDV.OqueFazer = 'FIN'
For Each Order EmpCod, PdvCod Where EmpCod = &insdtCadastroPDV.EmpCod Where PdvRandon = &insdtCadastroPDV.PdvRandon
&outsdtCadastroPDV.StsCom = 'S'
PdvUltSync = now() PdvVer = &insdtCadastroPDV.PdvVer
Exit EndFor
Commit EndCase
